description: US-Israel launch joint airstrikes on Iran nuclear sites. Supreme Leader Khamenei killed. Strait of Hormuz closed by IRGC.
Iran drone attacks on Ras Laffan force Qatar to suspend LNG production. Qatar = world's 2nd largest LNG exporter.
IEA announces 400M barrel release — largest in history. US commits 172M SPR barrels.
Dubai crude hits all-time high above $150/barrel. WTI-Dubai spread widens to unprecedented $50+
Brent above $100 for first time since 2022. Gas at highest since mid-2024.
US allows sanctioned Iranian tanker crude into market to ease prices.
Trump orders strikes on Iranian military assets at Kharg Island — 90% of Iran's oil exports ship from there.
Israel strikes South Pars — Iran's largest gas field. Iran retaliates: hits Saudi Aramco Samref refinery + UAE Al Hosn gas field.
Iranian missile strikes take out 17% of Qatar's LNG export capacity. Ras Laffan blaze controlled — no casualties.
Brent briefly touches $119 intraday high. Israel says helping reopen Hormuz. Netanyahu: 'War may end sooner than people think'
US Treasury Sec Bessent: US may free sanctioned Iranian tanker oil. Hegseth warns 'largest strike package yet'. Brent $110.30.
